rationale: The cited paper (“Valuing Customers”) directly models customer retention and acquisition cost as core levers, and the citing paper’s focal constructs and empirical design also center on per-customer retention/acquisition costs. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior analytical and empirical CRM cost research, which makes this citation plausibly foundational/method-relevant rather than incidental. With this thematic and methodological overlap, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
